summary.en: Draw a square grid map whose color adjacencies exactly realize a country graph while minimizing K/N.
summary.zh: 绘制一个方形网格地图，使颜色相邻关系精确表示国家图，并尽量最小化 K/N。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing the private official run manifest at private-benchmark/runs.json. The overlay also preserves the original Frontier-CS source testdata files under private-benchmark/source-testdata/.
